passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

skills.desc: [WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 5 [Breath] Potency on self (max 3)
skills.name: Compression

descs: [CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]. When [VibrationExplosion] is triggered on the target, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

skills.desc: [WhenUse] Final Power +1 for every 3 [Breath] Potency on self (max 5)
skills.name: Dismantle

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has 5+ [Vibration] Count, trigger [VibrationExplosion]. When [VibrationExplosion] is triggered on the target, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion] twice. When [VibrationExplosion] is triggered on the target, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1 (nullify 1 instance of [Vibration] Count reduction if this unit won the Clash)

skills.desc: [WhenUse] At 10+ [Breath] Potency, consume [Breath] Potency to gain +2 Final Power for every 3 [Breath] Potency consumed (max 4). Consume 3 additional [Breath] for every Final Power gained due to this effect
skills.name: Conduct Analysis

descs: If user took no HP damage last turn, guarantee a Crit
If user took HP damage last turn, does not Crit; instead, deal -80% damage
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion] thrice. When [VibrationExplosion] is triggered on the target, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 3 (max 9 [Vibration] Count reduction)

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Consume half of [Breath] Potency and Count on self
- Gain (sum of consumed [Breath] Potency and Count / 2) Final Power (max 20)
- Deal +(sum of consumed [Breath] Potency and Count x 2)% damage (max 50%)
- +(sum of consumed [Breath] Potency and Count x 4)% damage on Critical Hit (max 100%)
[DefeatDuel] Reduce remaining [Breath] Count by half
skills.name: Trigger Extinction Sequence

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Final Power +1 for [Breath] Potency on self (max 5)
[WhenUse] Gain 4 [Breath] Potency
- If this unit has Shield, gain +2 [Breath] Count as well
skills.name: Contemplation
